channel.title: Soundsmush
channel.description: A blog where I force myself to make music every week, among other things.

item.title: TEST (test) (Test)
item.description:
hey yall! i’ve been experimenting lately in terms of genre. been playing around with some higher energy stuff i might describe as atmospheric dnb? idk im bad with genres lol

but! i ended up making something i really liked. so of course i wanted to release it. but it’s nothing like what i normally make, and would be confusing since i just recently released a single in a similar style to my upcoming album. so what to do? naturally, make a new alias!

so yeah, here is the first track under my new alias yuridisc (thank you bray for the name), CDDAPCM!

also a small but exciting update: Afterlight has been selected to feature in the Edmonton Public Library’s local music collection, Capital City Records! It will be available to stream and download for free for anyone with an Edmonton library card on their website once everything has gone through :3

this is really exciting for me, since last year i submitted transience and it was not selected. this tells me that i have in fact improved as a producer, and it’s a way to hopefully get my music in more peoples’ ears. also, they are sending me an honorarium. i like money

anyway, that’s it for today. thanks for reading and listening! i hope you all like the new direction i’m branching off in!

item.title: new single + update
item.description:
hey yall! i’ve been experimenting lately in terms of genre. been playing around with some higher energy stuff i might describe as atmospheric dnb? idk im bad with genres lol

but! i ended up making something i really liked. so of course i wanted to release it. but it’s nothing like what i normally make, and would be confusing since i just recently released a single in a similar style to my upcoming album. so what to do? naturally, make a new alias!

so yeah, here is the first track under my new alias yuridisc (thank you bray for the name), CDDAPCM!

also a small but exciting update: Afterlight has been selected to feature in the Edmonton Public Library’s local music collection, Capital City Records! It will be available to stream and download for free for anyone with an Edmonton library card on their website once everything has gone through :3

this is really exciting for me, since last year i submitted transience and it was not selected. this tells me that i have in fact improved as a producer, and it’s a way to hopefully get my music in more peoples’ ears. also, they are sending me an honorarium. i like money

anyway, that’s it for today. thanks for reading and listening! i hope you all like the new direction i’m branching off in!

item.title: new (really old) music
item.description:
hello everynyan :3

just thought i’d let y’all know i updated my music page. i’ve added everything i could think to add, all of my oldest work, including things that were never released anywhere. it’s all shit! :D but i thought it might be interesting to have, for archival’s sake.

have a lovely day !

item.title: birthday (and new single)!
item.description:
happy birthday to me!!!! it is my birthday. yup and i had some pretty awesome sex today it was great. anyway yesterday i released a new double single, raven / nightbird, available to stream and purchase on my bandcamp! i’m quite proud of it, i had a lot of fun with the sound design and think both tracks turned out great.

the cover art is actually a picture of me, as is the alt cover, which i used as the track art for nightbird. the latter was edited by my friend vancouver aka SS22, who also came up with the title. he actually inspired me to make the track in the first place hahaha. both images are pretty minorly edited. i did some databending on the alt and used it as a layer on top of the original, which added some flair, i think.

anyway go listen! come onnn it’s my birthday surely you can help a girl out on her birthday pleading face

lots more to come! i have another album in the works. it’s pretty well in flux still, but i’m excited for it :3

item.title: site update again!
item.description:
hi!!!!!! kaylee back with another website update. this time, i made a few minor design changes, and added a new page.

  • removed drop shadows from most elements - i was just kind of getting tired of how they look
  • replaced the bi flag gif on the about and home pages with a lesbian one! because i’m a lesbian :)
  • added an 18+ warning on the homepage. while there isn’t anything really explicit here yet, i want to allow for that possibility in the future.
  • slight tweaks to about text
  • removed link to contact page (it was redundant)
  • aaaand added a new page cataloging all my music! there you’ll find a list of everything i’ve released, links to each, and a blurb containing my thoughts.

anyway, that’s all for today. thanks for reading, love you guys :3

item.title: SMUSH #26
item.description:
kaylee makes a not drone??? what is this????

Download?

today! i opened up fl studio and i actually made something :D it feels good!!! i am pretty happy with this. i want to add some more samples to it i think. and try and make the 606 sound less like a 606 lol

i’m currently sitting on a pretty good amount of unreleased music… new ep/album soon? maybe??? :3

oh! also, i’m looking into a potential physical release of afterlight… i’d love to do cassettes again, but it was quite expensive last time and it’s really hard to get them to sound good with the equipment i have. i might look into CDs once more… if i can find anywhere local that can do screen printing on discs, i think it’s viable!

item.title: SMUSH #25 - march update!
item.description:
WHAT DO YOU MEAN I HAVE NOT POSTED SINCE DECEMBER??? to make up for it, have this 30 minute drone ep i guess?

Download?

i have been on a drone kick in terms of music-making lately, for some reason. with three tracks totaling 30 minutes, i felt i might as well just make it an ep :3

i think it is still sort of rough, so i want to polish it a bit more, but once i do that (and come up with a decent cover) i’ll put it on bandcamp. for now, hope yall like it! each of the songs uses field recordings i’ve recorded during my commute. in that sense i suppose the ep has a bit of a public transit theme :>

anyway! it has been a while, hasn’t it? the past three months have been pretty great for me, all told!

  • got to see my long-distance partner for a week in january, which was just lovely. hoping he can visit again soon! we got to do so much, but those few days went by so quickly…
  • realized just how freeing polyamory is, this is definitely right for me. i have met so many lovely people, and it’s wonderful that i now get to call some of them my partners <3
  • been really feeling a sense of community lately! going to board game nights thanks to my girlfriend, and i’ve been spending time with them and eir other partners, which has been great :3
  • volunteered for the first time yesterday, at a symposium about queer entrepreneurship! got to talk to the other volunteers and feel useful, and i even got to partake in a lovely lunch and dinner at the event. it was a lot of fun :D
  • bought a few new cds :3 stereotomy by the alan parsons project (one of my favourites by them), pinkerton by weezer, and brat by charli xcx. the latter is an album i’d actually never even heard before deciding to buy it because i knew my partner really liked it, and i was not disappointed. seriously great album
  • on top of everything, i have been really feeling the effects of hrt. noticing a lot of really affirming changes, notably a good amount of breast growth

all in all, there is a lot in my life to be happy about right now. i feel like things have really turned around. thanks for catching up with me, love yall <3

item.title: site update!
item.description:
hello friends!!! i have updated the site once again!

i changed the moving background out for something more fitting. i liked the image collage, but it didn’t really match the aesthetic. i also changed the animation so it moves back and forth smoothly, which looks PRETTY SNAZZY!!!! (in my onion!) :3

also, i heavily updated my about page! go read it!!!!! i worked hard on it!!!!!!!!

that’s pretty much it, just wanted to recapitulate a bit :3 thank you so much for reading, it means a lot to me!

item.title: SMUSH #24
item.description:
another day, another smush (lie)

Download?

this was my first real foray into granular delay, and it’s really fun to play with! you can make some really neat sounds :3 i’m honestly really really happy with how this turned out, definitely want to incorporate it into a release. also, yes, i stole the latter half’s melody from contact by daft punk ;>

in other news, very slight site update where i changed the sidebar text to make the fact that i have an rss feed a little clearer, lol

in OTHER other news, i’ve been thinking a lot about my identity lately… i’ve been a furry for a few years now but it has never felt like a super large part of who i am. but recently, i’ve realized that it kind of is? for one, ever since my friend made me a tail, i wear it every chance i get… and it kind of gives me a similar feeling of euphoria as gender affirmation does, hehe. maybe it’s silly, but acting like a cat and being called one, just having that acknowledged, makes me so strangely happy :3

i really do feel like being a creature is an important part of who i am! so i’m trying out she/it pronouns. i’m thinking it/its a bit less often than she/her, but i want to try it out :3

the guy -> gay -> they -> girl -> girlthing pipeline is real, huh

item.title: kaylee's music picks for december 2025
item.description:
i like sharing the music i listen to, so i figured, why not post about it? on my BLOG???

lately i’ve been listening to some COOL SHIT that you should CHECK OUT.

doefriends - I WANT TO LOVE AGAIN

this one hits me RIGHT in the heartstrings. honestly, i found it in my youtube recommended, and it hit me so hard i cried. so obviously i had to buy the album after. i guess i just relate a bit to some of the songs, especially waiting. afaict, this is doefriends’s debut release, and it’s really impressive! i’m a huge fan of the vocals and just the general loud and messy feel of the instrumentation. and, of course, the lyrics. my two favourites on this album are definitely harness and waiting. really lovely release all around.

Ninajirachi - I Love My Computer

my partner showed me this album and i am SO glad he did. so so soooo catchy, every song is excellently produced, and again, great lyrics. i’m a big fan especially of ipod touch and delete. the latter especially is just so.. SO!!! so SCRUMPTIOUS. i dont even know. i just love the production on it and the lyrics and everything. it makes me feel like i’m having the experience of being a teenage girl that i never got.

Spott - Happy Heartcore

this one… well. this album is REALLY horny. but it just BANGS SO MUCH (pun intended). super big fan of music that makes my brain explode tbh (femtanyl ily). i do also enjoy some of the songs for their lyrics… but i feel a liiiittle weird listening to them, lol. gotta take my own advice and unlearn shame ^^’ funny enough, i know of this album because i listened to one song from it (Caboost!, which so happens to be my favourite track) years back on spotify. i didn’t even listen to the words at the time, but once i realized what it was actually about i felt too ashamed to listen to the rest xP but i spontaneously remembered that song recently, and lo and behold, i enjoy the whole album too :3

well, that’s a wrap for my picks for december. thanks for taking the time to read, i hope i could introduce you to some new music :3 have a lovely holiday season!

item.title: redesign
item.description:
just gave the site a design makeover!!!!! i’m really happy with how it turned out. the title and splash texts use a font i made specifically for this and i am really proud of the pixel assets i made. honestly i dunno why i decided to redesign the site, i kind of just felt like i wanted it to express me a bit more!

in other words, it needed to look more like a transgender furry made it.

anyway, any suggestions or critique for the design would be appreciated :3 i forgot how fun web design is!
